function.name: parse_date
function.description: Parse a date string and extract date components.
function.long_description: Parses a date string using the provided format and returns structured date components including weekday and ISO date.
example_user_queries: Call parse_date with date_string 01-12-2025 and format %d-%m-%Y.
Convert input date text into structured components.
Extract year month day from 15/08/2026 using %d/%m/%Y.
I need year and weekday from 2026-09-09.
